color_dna.emotion: Regal luxury, intimate exclusivity, handcrafted premium — not corporate gold but warm, earned gold
color_dna.saturation: muted with selective vivid gold accents

typography_dna.text_personality: editorial luxury — Playfair serif for display + Outfit geometric sans for body
typography_dna.flag: STRONG PAIRING — Playfair + Outfit is intentional, not generic

spatial_dna.layout_personality: editorial asymmetric — left-aligned text blocks with decorative right panels, staggered card offsets
spatial_dna.density: airy — generous whitespace, art gallery spacing

motion_gaps: NO page load sequence (just CSS stagger delays)

imagery_census.name: No product images
imagery_census.location: public/ only has default Next.js SVGs
imagery_census.purpose: CRITICAL GAP — luxury body butter site with zero product photography

strengths: Strong editorial luxury typography pairing (Playfair + Outfit)
Consistent gold accent system with gradient text, borders, shadows, rules
Well-structured component architecture (9 components, clean separation)
Excellent copy — brand voice is compelling, exclusive, authentic
Good semantic HTML with ARIA labels and skip links
Asymmetric layouts create visual interest (About section, Collections offset)
Mobile-first responsive design with proper dvh usage
Scent detail pages with interactive size selector

gaps.description: No smooth scroll engine — native browser scroll feels cheap for luxury
gaps.leverage: Lenis + GSAP ScrollTrigger transforms the entire feel

gaps.description: No GSAP at all — CSS reveals are functional but lack premium timing/stagger
gaps.leverage: GSAP ScrollTrigger section reveals + text animations

gaps.description: No page load sequence — content just fades in with CSS delays
gaps.leverage: Choreographed hero entry (bg → glow → headline → tagline → CTA)

gaps.description: Zero product images — luxury site with no visuals of the actual product
No cursor system — luxury sites need custom cursor at minimum trailing
gaps.leverage: Trailing cursor with magnetic CTAs adds premium feel

gaps.description: No text splitting/scramble animations for headlines
gaps.leverage: SplitText on key headlines adds editorial sophistication

gaps.description: No page transitions between home and shop pages
No parallax on decorative elements or background glows
gaps.leverage: Subtle parallax on gold glow orbs adds depth
